division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
text: Whenever the gross weight and any axle or wheel weight of a vehicle are in excess of the limits prescribed in this code, the excess weights shall be deemed one offense in violation of this code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 1. Penalties [42000 - 42032]
#### Article 2. Weight Violations [42030 - 42032]
##### § 42031

Whenever the gross weight and any axle or wheel weight of a vehicle are in excess of the limits prescribed in this code, the excess weights shall be deemed one offense in violation of this code.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Whenever the gross weight and any axle or wheel weight of a vehicle are in excess of the limits prescribed in this code, the excess weights shall be deemed one offense in violation of this code.
